name: agentic-supplychain-evals
description: Evaluation configuration for the Agentic Supply Chain orchestrator demo

evaluators.name: groundedness
evaluators.description: Checks that the response is grounded in retrieved data and documents

evaluators.name: relevance
evaluators.description: Checks that the response is relevant to the question asked

evaluators.name: completeness
evaluators.description: Checks that the response addresses all parts of the question
